screenshot.guide:
f%Screenshot Mode lets you capture the current terminal display.
Drag to select an area, or double-click to select the entire terminal.
Right-click the selection to open the menu, then click anywhere outside to close it.
<fg:bright_red>Note: Screenshot Mode does not pause the current screen.</fg>
Press {key:host_key.screenshot} again to exit Screenshot Mode.
Outside Screenshot Mode, quickly press {key:host_key.screenshot} twice to capture the entire terminal.
<fg:bright_blue>[Guide closes after any action]</fg>
